mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN pov.code LIKE 'U133%' THEN '4000' ELSE '1000' END AS "CORP_CD", CASE WHEN pov.code LIKE 'U133%' THEN '11900078' ELSE '20001073' END AS "CONT_NO", o.order_number AS "SEQ", TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "ISSUE_DATE", pov.code AS "GOODS_NO", oi.quantity AS "ISSUE_QTY", o.customer_name AS "RCVER_NM", SUBSTRING(REPLACE(o.customer_phone, '-', ''), 1, 3) AS "RCVER_TEL_AREA_NO", SUBSTRING(REPLACE(o.customer_phone, '-', ''), 4, LENGTH(REPLACE(o.customer_phone, '-', '')) - 7) AS "RCVER_TEL_EXCHGE_NO", RIGHT(REPLACE(o.customer_phone, '-', ''), 4) AS "RCVER_TEL_NO" FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN order_item_options oio ON oi.id = oio.order_item_id JOIN product_option_values pov ON oio.option_value_id = pov.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
